top_signals.title: Copper Rallies as Risk Assets Shrug Off More US Strikes on Iran
top_signals.summary: Copper jumped during a broad rally for industrial metals as investors shrugged off a fresh round of US strikes on Iran to track broader gains in risk assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Rain-Soaked China Braces For 'Gargantuan' Typhoon
top_signals.summary: China is facing more torrential rain and flooding this weekend from a massive typhoon tracking toward the country’s east coast, following recent severe storms that led to deaths and crop damage. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fuel Prices Show Inflation Is Still a Risk for Markets
top_signals.summary: While oil prices have fallen, the cost of refined products like gasoline and diesel are proving to be much stickier.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Is Europe prepared for a world of extreme heat?
top_signals.summary: In an air-conditioned Luxembourg meeting, ministers call for a ‘business case’ for coping with the world’s fastest-warming continent
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nigerian Stocks Vault Past South Korea’s Kospi to Claim World’s Top Returns
top_signals.summary: Nigerian equities have overtaken South Korea’s to hand investors the highest dollar-based returns this year, as souring sentiment on artificial-intelligence stocks pushes the Asian nation’s world-beating rally into bear territory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Devolution has no easy answers on ‘fairness’
top_signals.summary: The consensus backing more local power sharing rarely confronts fundamental trade-offs
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
